info.description: REST API for the Zdrovena monthly accounting close pipeline. All endpoints require a valid Azure Entra ID JWT (Bearer token). Set AZURE_AUTH_DISABLED=true for local dev.
info.title: Zdrovena Reconciliation API

409.description: Order cannot be cancelled (already sent / unknown)

post.description:
Run the month-close pipeline for the given year/month.

Requires ``zdrovena-accountant`` or ``zdrovena-admin`` role.
Use ``dry_run=true`` to simulate without writing files or sending email.
post.summary: Run monthly close pipeline

get.description: Return last N close runs, newest first. Accessible to viewer role and above.

schema.title: Response Get Close History Api Close History Get

delete.description: Remove one history entry. Requires accountant or admin role.
delete.summary: Delete a history entry by timestamp

get.description:
Return which pipeline steps have already been completed for the given month.

Read-only — accessible to viewer role and above (D3 decision from eng review).
get.summary: Get pipeline checkpoint state for a given month

409.description: Another action already owns this period

post.summary: Execute one explicit month-close stage
Start a fresh month-close run for the selected period

get.description:
List files in storage under an optional prefix.

By default returns virtual folder entries for subdirectories so the
frontend can navigate the tree one level at a time.  Pass ``flat=true``
to get the old behaviour (every blob, no folder entries).

parameters.description: Return all files recursively without virtual folders
parameters.name: flat

schema.description: Return all files recursively without virtual folders
schema.title: Flat
Response List Files Api Files Get

delete.description: Delete a file from storage. Requires accountant or admin role.

get.description:
Stream a file from storage. Requires viewer role or above.

``key`` is the full storage path, e.g. ``invoices/sales/2026/03/faktura-001.pdf``.

put.description: Upload a file to storage. Requires accountant or admin role.

schema.title: Response Update Draft Api Shipping Drafts  Draft Id  Patch

post.description:
Poll an outstanding Allegro create-command and finalise the draft.

Ship-with-Allegro create-commands are asynchronous. ``execute_draft`` returns
``pending_confirmation`` when the command is still IN_PROGRESS after the
short in-request polling window. This endpoint is the durable follow-up:
call it (via UI action or a cron/worker) to check the command status and
either promote the draft to ``created`` (SUCCESS) or ``error`` (ERROR).

Idempotent: safe to call multiple times. Returns the current draft.

schema.title: Response Confirm Pending Command Api Shipping Drafts  Draft Id  Confirm Post

post.summary: Poll Allegro create-command and finalise a pending_confirmation draft

schema.title: Response Create Draft Invoice Api Shipping Drafts  Draft Id  Create Invoice Post

parameters.description: inpost, apaczka, or allegro_delivery (defaults to draft's courier)
parameters.name: courier

schema.description: inpost, apaczka, or allegro_delivery (defaults to draft's courier)
schema.title: Courier

post.description:
Idempotent operator action to mark the draft as fulfilled.

A draft only represents "we intend to ship", not "we shipped". The operator
confirms via the UI once the parcel actually leaves — this endpoint sets the
local ``fulfillment_status="fulfilled"`` flag (with ``fulfilled_at`` /
``fulfilled_by``) for every draft, regardless of source.

For Allegro drafts we additionally invoke
``AllegroClient.mark_order_processed(external_order_id, status="SENT")`` to
move the order to ``SENT`` on Allegro's side (the parcel has left), and mirror
the timestamps into the legacy ``allegro_fulfillment_status`` /
``allegro_marked_processed_*`` fields.

Re-running this endpoint is safe: if the draft is already fulfilled we
return 200 without hitting Allegro again.

schema.title: Response Mark Fulfilled Api Shipping Drafts  Draft Id  Mark Fulfilled Post

409.description: Allegro draft has no external Allegro order id

502.description: Allegro API error (only for Allegro drafts)

post.summary: Manually mark the draft as fulfilled (operator action)

409.description: Pickup already ordered or draft not ready

post.summary: Order InPost kurier pickup for an executed draft

delete.description: Cancel the Allegro shipment created for this draft (before it is dispatched).

schema.title: Response Cancel Shipment Api Shipping Drafts  Draft Id  Shipment Delete

delete.summary: Cancel a Ship-with-Allegro shipment before dispatch

post.description:
Merge the labels of the given drafts into one PDF (R5-B).

Drafts are grouped by courier (each fetched via the same path as the single
label endpoint), then concatenated in the request order. Fails deterministically:
  * empty / oversized ``draft_ids`` → 400
  * a not-yet-ready label → 409 listing the offending drafts
  * an unknown draft id → 404 listing them

400.description: No draft_ids, too many, or unsupported courier

409.description: One or more labels are not ready yet

post.summary: Fetch and merge labels for several drafts into one printable PDF
